query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS migration_rollback_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  jobId INT NOT NULL,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL,
  mrlEntityType ENUM('contact','company','deal','activity') NOT NULL,
  entityId INT NOT NULL,
  mrlCreatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_mrl_job (jobId),
  INDEX idx_mrl_tenant (tenantId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS currency_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  csrTenantId INT NOT NULL,
  baseCurrency VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  enabledCurrencies JSON DEFAULT ('["USD"]'),
  exchangeRates JSON DEFAULT ('{}'),
  csrLastUpdated BIGINT,
  csrUpdatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_currency_tenant (csrTenantId)
);
